---
description: Summarize project context
---

Summarize the current state of the project. 
Include key milestones, recent achievements, and any ongoing challenges. This summary will be used to keep all team members informed and aligned on the project's progress.
Output this as a structured Markdown summary.md file.

if the summary.md file exists then update the summary.md file with the new information, otherwise create a new summary.md file with the provided information.
